title: cystopteris regia var. dickieana
intro: Cystopteris regia var. dickieana, also known as the Royal Fern, is a rare and endangered variety of the Cystopteris regia fern species native to the UK. As a medicinal plant, Cystopteris regia var. dickieana is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Cystopteris regia var. dickieana can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal purposes.
